name: Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, late payments cause cash flow gaps. We automate late payment follow-up instead of manual follow-up and tracking in spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Late payment follow-up and cash flow management

locked_fields.primary_problem: Late payment follow-up and cash flow management
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, late payments cause cash flow gaps. We automate late payment follow-up instead of manual follow-up and tracking in spreadsheets.
locked_fields.current_alternative: Manual follow-up and tracking in spreadsheets

one_liner: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, late payments cause cash flow gaps. We automate late payment follow-up instead of manual follow-up and tracking in spreadsheets.
